items.title_en: Turkish police arrest more than 500 people at May Day rallies
items.title_zh: 土耳其警方在五一集会上逮捕了500多人
items.desc_en: Turkey sees significant police deployments on 1 May each year, when marches led by workers and unions are held.
items.desc_zh: 土耳其每年 5 月 1 日都会部署大量警察，届时工人和工会会举行游行。

items.title_en: Bitcoin surged in April, but weak buyer demand makes the rally vulnerable
items.title_zh: 比特币四月份飙升，但买家需求疲软导致涨势脆弱
items.desc_en: Bitcoin surged in April, but its run could be on shaky ground, according to CryptoQuant.
items.desc_zh: 据 CryptoQuant 称，比特币在四月份飙升，但其运行可能不稳定。

items.title_en: Israeli police arrest man after nun attacked in Jerusalem
items.title_zh: 以色列警方在耶路撒冷修女遇袭后逮捕一名男子
items.desc_en: The French nun was pushed over and kicked in the apparently unprovoked assault, amid a rise in harassment of Christians in the city by Jewish extremists.
items.desc_zh: 在该市犹太极端分子骚扰基督徒的事件增多之际，这名法国修女在这起看似无端的袭击中被推倒并被踢。

items.title_zh: 南佛罗里达大学失踪学生遗体通过DNA确认 - NBC新闻

items.desc_zh: Remains of missing University of South Florida student confirmed through DNA  NBC NewsSheriff Chronister provides update on murders of 2 USF students  WFLAStudent starts petition for safer off campus

items.title_en: Alphabet is winning the AI revolution. Here's how Mike Khouw is trading it
items.title_zh: Alphabet 正在赢得人工智能革命。以下是 Mike Khouw 的交易方式
items.desc_en: The takeaway could not have been clearer: Alphabet isn't just surviving the AI revolution — in many ways, it's leading it.
items.desc_zh: 结论再清楚不过了：Alphabet 不仅在人工智能革命中幸存下来——在很多方面，它还在引领这场革命。

items.title_en: Apple proves once again it is the ultimate cash machine. How to trade the stock from here
items.title_zh: 苹果再次证明它是终极提款机。如何从这里交易股票
items.desc_en: While the rest of the 'Mag 7' is caught up in the artificial intelligence arms race, Apple remains the ultimate shareholder 'Cash Machine.'
items.desc_zh: 虽然“Mag 7”的其他公司都陷入了人工智能军备竞赛，但苹果仍然是最终股东“提款机”。

items.title_en: War criminal Mladic close to death, say lawyers asking judge for jail release
items.title_zh: 律师称战犯姆拉迪奇濒临死亡，要求法官释放监狱
items.desc_en: Mladic, 84, was jailed for life for genocide, war crimes and crimes against humanity during the Bosnian war in 1992-95.
items.desc_zh: 84 岁的姆拉迪奇因 1992-95 年波斯尼亚战争期间的种族灭绝罪、战争罪和反人类罪被判终身监禁。

items.title_en: UK exports to U.S. plunge by 25% after Trump's 'liberation day' tariffs blitz

items.desc_en: The U.K. is now running a trade deficit with its largest trading partner.
items.desc_zh: 英国目前与其最大贸易伙伴存在贸易逆差。

items.desc_en: Atlassian's stock has been hit hard in the "SaaS-pocalypse" sweeping software names as AI threatens to disrupt their business models.

items.title_en: Roblox shares plummet 18% as child safety measures weigh on bookings
items.title_zh: 由于儿童安全措施影响预订量，Roblox 股价暴跌 18%
items.desc_en: Roblox is facing over 140 federal lawsuits accusing it of failing to prevent child exploitation, and last month settled with Alabama and West Virginia.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 面临 140 多起联邦诉讼，指控其未能防止儿童剥削，并于上个月与阿拉巴马州和西弗吉尼亚州达成和解。

items.title_en: Lutnick gets grilling on Nvidia chip sales to China in letter from Sen. Chris Coons
items.title_zh: 参议员克里斯·库恩斯 (Chris Coons) 致信，批评卢特尼克 (Lutnick) 就 Nvidia 向中国销售芯片一事进行质问
items.desc_en: Sen. Chris Coons demanded answers on H200 chips sales to China after Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick and the Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang give differing answers.
items.desc_zh: 在商务部长霍华德·卢特尼克和英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋给出不同答案后，参议员克里斯·库恩斯要求回答有关向中国销售 H200 芯片的问题。

items.desc_zh: 95 岁的巴菲特将首次不再成为舞台上的中心人物，这标志着最受关注的投资仪式之一进入了新时代。

items.desc_zh: 福斯高中发生袭击事件后，五名学生和一名保安被送往医院。

items.title_en: Brazil's Congress approves plan to drastically cut Bolsonaro's jail term
items.title_zh: 巴西国会批准大幅缩短博尔索纳罗刑期的计划
items.desc_en: Last year ex-president Jair Bolsonaro was sentenced to 27 years in jail for plotting a coup after losing an election.
items.desc_zh: 去年，前总统雅伊尔·博尔索纳罗因在选举失败后策划政变而被判处 27 年监禁。

items.desc_zh: Lindsay 和 Craig Foreman 去年在伊朗骑摩托车旅行时被捕，目前面临 10 年监禁的现实。

items.title_en: Oscar goes missing after Academy Award winner is blocked from taking it on flight

items.desc_zh: 该航空公司表示对这种情况感到遗憾，并正在为该奖项进行紧急“全面内部搜索”。

items.title_zh: 特朗普面临伊朗战争关键的 60 天最后期限，油价上涨

items.desc_zh: 根据 1973 年战争权力决议，美国总统需要在向国会报告军队部署情况后 60 天撤军

items.desc_zh: 这位流行歌星的代表称这一事件“完全不可原谅”，此后她已经接受了康复治疗。

items.desc_zh: 这位诺贝尔和平奖获得者自 2021 年在军事政变中被赶下台以来一直被拘留。

items.title_en: The friendlier the AI chatbot the more inaccurate it is, study suggests
items.title_zh: 研究表明，人工智能聊天机器人越友好，它就越不准确

items.desc_zh: 研究人员发现，将人工智能系统调整为对用户更加热情和友好会导致“准确性权衡”。
